race.comment: KIRIKAN (1) doesn't win out of turn but has hit the frame in all four runs since joining the new stable with Wiggins being on top on all four occasions. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky alley to be playing a major role in the outcome. KOBAYASTAR (8) saves her best form for her home circuit here and doesn't know how to run a bad race. Don't dismiss lightly. PRO FORMA (2) gets 2kg off from the favourable draw and looks a genuine top-three candidate on best figures. IMPRESSIONISM (3) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Capable of bouncing back. PRIMO (7) next in line while fresh.
